mediapackagev2.originendpointpolicy.CfnA: Specifies the configuration parameters of a policy associated with a MediaPackage V2 origin endpoint.

mediapackagev2.originendpointpolicy.Chan.Description: The name of the channel group associated with the origin endpoint policy.
The channel name associated with the origin endpoint policy.

mediapackagev2.originendpointpolicy.Orig.Description: The name of the origin endpoint associated with the origin endpoint policy.

mediapackagev2.originendpointpolicy.Poli.Description: The policy associated with the origin endpoint.
